params.title: Stickers Collected
params.description: Vertical bar graph appears. Stickers Collected. Scale of 10. Eli=7, Fay=12, Gus=19, Hal=23.

beats.text: You learned to CHOOSE scales, not just use them. You check if the biggest number fits. You check the last digits to look for multiples of 5. Then you pick what's easiest to read without too many lines.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Stickers Collected. Scale of 10. Four bars visible.

beats.text: That's strategic thinking. You're not just following rules. You're making decisions.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Stickers Collected. Scale of 10. Four bars visible.

beats.text: Next time, you'll use your graphs to solve problems and answer questions. The scale you choose will help you find answers faster.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Stickers Collected. Scale of 10. Four bars visible.
